items.title: Random Forests (Breiman, 2001)
items.author: Leo Breiman
items.note: Original paper defining random forests as bagging plus random feature selection at splits.

items.title: Bagging Predictors (Breiman, 1996)
items.author: Leo Breiman
items.note: Introduces bootstrap aggregating—the row-level randomness underlying random forests.

items.title: scikit-learn RandomForestClassifier
items.author: scikit-learn developers
items.note: API reference for n_estimators, max_features, bootstrap, oob_score, and parallel n_jobs.
